name: ccview
description: Claude Code session viewer and analytics dashboard

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @ccview/core build && pnpm --filter @ccview/server build && (pnpm --filter @ccview/core build:watch & pnpm --filter @ccview/server start & pnpm --filter @ccview/web dev)
scripts.publish:prepare: pnpm --filter @ccview/web build && pnpm --filter @ccview/core build && pnpm --filter @ccview/server build && pnpm --filter @ccview/server copy-web && pnpm --filter ccview build
scripts.publish:dry: pnpm run publish:prepare && pnpm --filter ccview publish --dry-run --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:npm: pnpm run publish:prepare && pnpm --filter @ccview/core publish --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @ccview/server publish --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter ccview publish --no-git-checks
